title: Will the People's Bank of China Cut 1-10 bps at the March 2026 PBOC meeting?
rules: If the People's Bank of China takes the action of Cut 1-10 bps at the March 2026 PBOC meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Top Song on Weekly Top Songs USA on Mar 19, 2026?
subtitle: :: Dominic Fike
rules: If Babydoll is #1 on the Weekly Top Songs USA chart on the chart dated Mar 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Top Song on Weekly Top Songs USA on Mar 19, 2026?
subtitle: :: PinkPantheress
rules: If Stateside + Zara Larsson is #1 on the Weekly Top Songs USA chart on the chart dated Mar 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Top Song on Weekly Top Songs USA on Mar 19, 2026?
subtitle: :: Bruno Mars
rules: If Risk It All is #1 on the Weekly Top Songs USA chart on the chart dated Mar 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the **high temp in LA** be >90° on Mar 19, 2026?
rules: If the highest temperature recorded in Los Angeles Airport, CA for March 19, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is greater than 90°, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the **high temp in LA** be <83° on Mar 19, 2026?
rules: If the highest temperature recorded in Los Angeles Airport, CA for March 19, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is less than 83°, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the maximum temperature be  <101° on Mar 19, 2026?
rules: If the maximum temperature recorded at Phoenix for Mar 19, 2026, is less than 101° fahrenheit according to the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will legislation providing full-year FY2026 discretionary appropriations for the Department of Homeland Security (including via continuing resolution) become law before Mar 20, 2026?
rules: If legislation providing full-year FY2026 discretionary appropriations for the Department of Homeland Security (including via continuing resolution) has become law before Mar 20, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the President's approval rating be below 42.5 according to RealClearPolitics?
subtitle: 42.4 or below
rules: If the President's approval rating is below 42.5% at 11:00 AM ET on March 20, 2026 according to RealClearPolitics, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the President's approval rating be between 42.5 and 42.7 according to RealClearPolitics?
subtitle: 42.5 to 42.7
rules: If the President's approval rating is between 42.5 and 42.7% at 11:00 AM ET on March 20, 2026 according to RealClearPolitics, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the Nasdaq-100 be between 23200 and 23299.9900 at the end of Mar 20, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
subtitle: 23,200 to 23,299.99
rules: If the end-of-day Nasdaq 100 index value on March 20, 2026 is between 23200 and 23299.9900, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the Nasdaq-100 be between 24000 and 24099.9900 at the end of Mar 20, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
subtitle: 24,000 to 24,099.99
rules: If the end-of-day Nasdaq 100 index value on March 20, 2026 is between 24000 and 24099.9900, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will AI-linked job losses on Friday, Mar 20 be above 87000?
rules: If the "Total AI-linked job losses" figure displayed on jobloss.ai on Mar 20, 2026 at 5pm ET is above 87,000, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will AI-linked job losses on Friday, Mar 20 be above 84000?
rules: If the "Total AI-linked job losses" figure displayed on jobloss.ai on Mar 20, 2026 at 5pm ET is above 84,000, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the silver open price be above $76.49 on Mar 20, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
rules: If the open price of the 1-minute candlestick for silver on March 20, 2026 at 5 PM EDT is above $76.49, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Miami vs Washington Winner?
rules: If Miami wins the Miami vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 18, 2026 at 6:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Miami vs Washington Winner?
rules: If Washington wins the Miami vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 18, 2026 at 6:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Detroit vs Pittsburgh Winner?
rules: If Pittsburgh wins the Detroit vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 18, 2026 at 6:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
